title: Statera
description: a perfect balance of utility, quality, and performance (26.2 alpha released)
body:
(formerly named "Vanilla Multiplied")\
a compilation of great mods

i dont recommend downloading modpack versions before "Vanilla Multiplied 1.6.10a (1.21.8)", as those are a bit cluttered

if the modpack gets enough downloads, i will port the old versions (1.21.4, 5, and 8) into the new versions of the pack
### credits
based on:
- [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)
- and the remains of simply optimized

vanilla tweaks:
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
